## What does this do?

<!-- A short description of the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🔥 New roast / stat
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Roasts stay offline and deterministic (no network, no API keys)
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
